chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. Sales Tax Reference Application No. 241 of 2006 along with Spl. STRA No. 57 of 2009 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ Hearing of case. For hearing of main case. -------------- 26.09.2024. None present for the Applicant. Mr. Ahmed Hussain along with Mr. Shahrukh, Advoates for Respondnet. ********* None present on behalf of the Applicant nor any intimation received. On the last date of hearing i.e. 29.08.2024, the following order was passed:- “None present on behalf of the Applicant nor any intimation received. Since Counsel for the Applicant is seriously ill and is no more representing the Applicant let a direction be issued to the Applicant for the next date with a note of caution that if no assistance is provided, appropriate order may be passed. To come up on 26.09.2024. Office to place copy of this order in connected case. As per bailiff’s report, the Applicant’s office has refused to receive the notice on the ground that this case does not pertain to them. In view of such position, this Court is left with no choice but to dismiss these Reference Applications for non-prosecution. Order accordingly. Office to place copy of this order in the connected Reference Application. J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
